summary: Iteration 36 - UI/UX Overhaul Testing: DashboardShell Migration & P0 Info Sheets Feature. All 4 dashboards (Admin, Case Manager, Partner, Client) successfully migrated to shared DashboardShell component with grouped collapsible sidebar navigation. P0 feature (Case Manager Info Sheets tab) fully functional - shows client cases as cards, clicking loads InfoSheetEditor, back navigation works.
critical_code_review_comments: DashboardShell component correctly implements shared sidebar layout with grouped navigation (NavGroup component)
Admin dashboard has 4 nav groups: Sales & Finance (5 items), Cases & Users (3 items), System (3 items), Tools (4 items) - all 12 tabs clickable
Case Manager dashboard has grouped nav: Case Management (My Cases, Pending Review, Info Sheets), Documents (All Documents, Expiry Alerts) - all 7 tabs clickable
Client dashboard converted from Tabs to sidebar: My Case group (Action Required, Workflow Steps, My Documents, My Info Sheet), Finance (Payments) - all 7 tabs clickable
Partner dashboard has flat nav: Dashboard, My Sales, Commission, Support - all 4 tabs clickable
P0 Feature: Info Sheets tab shows 8 client case cards with client name, email, case ID, product
P0 Feature: Clicking case card loads InfoSheetEditor with all sections (Personal Details, Family Chart, Dependent Children, etc.)
P0 Feature: Back navigation (arrow button) returns to case list correctly
Mobile responsive: Menu button toggles sidebar on mobile viewport (390x844)
Logout button works from all 4 role dashboards
NotificationBell component integrated in header via DashboardShell
Teal #2a777a brand color maintained across all dashboards
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 36 tested UI/UX overhaul with DashboardShell migration. ALL PASSED: (1) Admin - 12 sidebar tabs work (Dashboard, Pending Sales, Sales Report, Commissions, Refunds, Payment Reminders, All Cases, Pending Assignment, Users, Products, Tickets, Settings), (2) Case Manager - 7 sidebar tabs work including P0 Info Sheets feature, (3) Client - 7 sidebar tabs work (Overview, Action Required, Workflow Steps, My Documents, My Info Sheet, Payments, Support), (4) Partner - 4 sidebar tabs work + New Sale button in header opens dialog, (5) Logout works from all dashboards, (6) Mobile menu button toggles sidebar. P0 Info Sheets feature: shows 8 case cards, clicking loads InfoSheetEditor, back navigation works.

admin_dashboard.grouped_nav_sales_finance: PASS - Pending Sales, Sales Report, Commissions, Refunds, Payment Reminders
admin_dashboard.grouped_nav_cases_users: PASS - All Cases, Pending Assignment, Users
admin_dashboard.grouped_nav_tools: PASS - Analytics, Activity Log, Workflows, Marketing

case_manager_dashboard.grouped_nav_case_management: PASS - My Cases, Pending Review, Info Sheets
case_manager_dashboard.info_sheets_click_card: PASS - Loads InfoSheetEditor with client data

mocked_services.email_service: MOCKED - In-app notifications only, no real email sent
